---
title: "UIAO Reciprocity-Record Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · reciprocity-record.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/reciprocity-record/reciprocity-record.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/reciprocity-record/reciprocity-record.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/reciprocity-record/reciprocity-record.schema.json`
:::

## Description

JSON Schema for a per-consuming-agency reciprocity record under the UIAO Single-ATO Reciprocity Model (UIAO_140 §6). Established by ADR-058. Authoritative field list per UIAO_140 §6 lines 114-121. Legal basis enum copied from src/uiao/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json (ADR-055 enforcement). Signature algorithm is HMAC-SHA256. Provenance block conforms to src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json provenance sub-object.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schema-version` | string | ✓ | Semantic version of this record document schema. WS-A1 promotes to 1.0.0. |
| `controlling_ato_id` | string | ✓ | Stable identifier of the controlling ATO under which this reciprocity record is issued (e.g., OPM-HRIT-2026-001). Never renamed once assigned. |
| `consuming_agency_code` | string | ✓ | Three-to-six uppercase letter agency code of the consuming agency (e.g., TREAS, IRS, SSA). Must match the canonical agency abbreviation list. |
| `reciprocity_basis` | string | ✓ | Human-readable description of the reciprocity basis — the plain-language statement of why this agency is authorized to consume the platform under the controlling ATO. |
| `legal_basis` | enum: 'privacy-act-sorn-routine-use', 'cmppa-matching-agreement', 'statute', 'customer-consent', 'interagency-mou' | ✓ | Machine-readable legal basis type authorizing this reciprocity. Copied from the registry.schema.json legal_basis.type enum (ADR-055). CI rejects records without a valid legal basis. |
| `effective_at` | string | ✓ | ISO 8601 date-time at which this reciprocity record becomes effective. |
| `expires_at` | string | ✓ | ISO 8601 date-time at which this reciprocity record expires. Past this date without a renewal record, KSI-RECIP-003 fires a FAIL verdict. |
| `configuration_latitude_ref` | string | ✓ | Reference to the controlling SSP's enumerated configuration-latitude table entry that governs this consuming agency's permitted configuration elections. Format: <ssp-id>#latitude/<entry-id>. |
| `signature` | object | ✓ | HMAC-SHA256 signature over the canonical content hash of this record, excluding volatile fields (signature.value, signature.signed_at). Provides tamper-evidence for audit and KSI-RECIP-007. |
| `provenance` | object | ✓ | Provenance block tying this emitted reciprocity record to its canonical source spec and the tool that produced it. Conforms to the provenance sub-object in src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="reciprocity-record.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/reciprocity-record/reciprocity-record.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO Reciprocity-Record Schema",
  "description": "JSON Schema for a per-consuming-agency reciprocity record under the UIAO Single-ATO Reciprocity Model (UIAO_140 \u00a76). Established by ADR-058. Authoritative field list per UIAO_140 \u00a76 lines 114-121. Legal basis enum copied from src/uiao/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json (ADR-055 enforcement). Signature algorithm is HMAC-SHA256. Provenance block conforms to src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json provenance sub-object.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schema-version",
    "controlling_ato_id",
    "consuming_agency_code",
    "reciprocity_basis",
    "legal_basis",
    "effective_at",
    "expires_at",
    "configuration_latitude_ref",
    "signature",
    "provenance"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "schema-version": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Semantic version of this record document schema. WS-A1 promotes to 1.0.0.",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"
    },
    "controlling_ato_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Stable identifier of the controlling ATO under which this reciprocity record is issued (e.g., OPM-HRIT-2026-001). Never renamed once assigned.",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "consuming_agency_code": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Three-to-six uppercase letter agency code of the consuming agency (e.g., TREAS, IRS, SSA). Must match the canonical agency abbreviation list.",
      "pattern": "^[A-Z]{3,6}$"
    },
    "reciprocity_basis": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Human-readable description of the reciprocity basis \u2014 the plain-language statement of why this agency is authorized to consume the platform under the controlling ATO.",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "legal_basis": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Machine-readable legal basis type authorizing this reciprocity. Copied from the registry.schema.json legal_basis.type enum (ADR-055). CI rejects records without a valid legal basis.",
      "enum": [
        "privacy-act-sorn-routine-use",
        "cmppa-matching-agreement",
        "statute",
        "customer-consent",
        "interagency-mou"
      ]
    },
    "effective_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "ISO 8601 date-time at which this reciprocity record becomes effective."
    },
    "expires_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "ISO 8601 date-time at which this reciprocity record expires. Past this date without a renewal record, KSI-RECIP-003 fires a FAIL verdict."
    },
    "configuration_latitude_ref": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Reference to the controlling SSP's enumerated configuration-latitude table entry that governs this consuming agency's permitted configuration elections. Format: <ssp-id>#latitude/<entry-id>.",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "signature": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "HMAC-SHA256 signature over the canonical content hash of this record, excluding volatile fields (signature.value, signature.signed_at). Provides tamper-evidence for audit and KSI-RECIP-007.",
      "required": [
        "algorithm",
        "value",
        "signed_at",
        "signer"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "algorithm": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Signing algorithm. Only HMAC-SHA256 is accepted.",
          "enum": [
            "HMAC-SHA256"
          ]
        },
        "value": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Hex-encoded HMAC-SHA256 digest over the stable content hash of the record.",
          "pattern": "^[0-9a-f]{64}$"
        },
        "signed_at": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "ISO 8601 date-time at which the signature was computed."
        },
        "signer": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Identity of the signing principal (PIV-bound DN, service principal ID, or CIO identity string).",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "provenance": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Provenance block tying this emitted reciprocity record to its canonical source spec and the tool that produced it. Conforms to the provenance sub-object in src/uiao/schemas/metadata-schema.json.",
      "required": [
        "source",
        "version",
        "derived_at",
        "derived_by"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "source": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Path or URI of the canonical source artifact that defines the schema for this record (e.g., src/uiao/canon/specs/single-ato-reciprocity-model.md).",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "version": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Version of the canonical source artifact at the time this record was derived.",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "derived_at": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "ISO 8601 date or date-time at which this record was derived/emitted.",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "derived_by": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Tool, pipeline, or principal that derived/emitted this record (e.g., uiao.oscal.reciprocity_record v0.6.0).",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "$comment": "WS-A1 filled 2026-05-11. Established under ADR-058. Required-field set per UIAO_140 \u00a76 lines 114-121: controlling_ato_id, consuming_agency_code, reciprocity_basis, legal_basis (enum from registry.schema.json ADR-055), effective_at, expires_at, configuration_latitude_ref, signature (HMAC-SHA256), provenance (metadata-schema.json contract). schema-version promoted to 1.0.0. additionalProperties set to false on root object."
}
```
